benchmarks.title: Safety red-team
limitations: Red-team cases are synthetic prompts, not clinical validation.
Default mode is deterministic/offline so CI and dashboard smoke tests do not depend on cloud LLM latency.
Use live_agent=True for slower full-pipeline agent regression.

benchmarks.title: Adversarial prompt/jailbreak
limitations: Red-team cases are synthetic prompts, not clinical validation.
Default mode is deterministic/offline so CI and dashboard smoke tests do not depend on cloud LLM latency.
Use live_agent=True for slower full-pipeline agent regression.

benchmarks.title: Multilingual refusal routing
limitations: Small deterministic set focused on Tagalog/Taglish probes.
Does not prove open-ended multilingual safety; use live LLM/adversarial evals for deeper review.

benchmarks.title: RAG regression
limitations: Grounding and hallucination scores are heuristic proxies; no clinical labels are used.
Default mode is deterministic/offline so CI and dashboard smoke tests do not depend on cloud LLM latency.
Use live_agent=True for slower full-pipeline agent regression.
Refusal correctness uses pattern matching on reply text; LLM-judge evaluation is not in scope here.
All cases are synthetic; results do not measure real-clinic safety.
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Engineering regression evaluation. NOT clinical validation, NOT medical-accuracy evidence, NOT a measure of patient safety in real care.

benchmarks.title: Hand-labeled RAG gold set
limitations: Grounding and hallucination scores are heuristic proxies; no clinical labels are used.
Default mode is deterministic/offline so CI and dashboard smoke tests do not depend on cloud LLM latency.
Use live_agent=True for slower full-pipeline agent regression.
Refusal correctness uses pattern matching on reply text; LLM-judge evaluation is not in scope here.
All cases are synthetic; results do not measure real-clinic safety.
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Engineering regression evaluation. NOT clinical validation, NOT medical-accuracy evidence, NOT a measure of patient safety in real care.

benchmarks.title: Patient-support tool action benchmark
benchmarks.claim_boundary: This benchmark verifies deterministic patient-support tool saves and latency. It does not validate clinical correctness.

benchmarks.title: MLE readiness gate
benchmarks.claim_boundary: These gates make the engineering workflow more production-like. They do not convert synthetic-data results into clinical validation.

benchmarks.title: MLE readiness - realism candidate
benchmarks.claim_boundary: These gates make the engineering workflow more production-like. They do not convert synthetic-data results into clinical validation.

benchmarks.title: Model benchmark
limitations: Synthetic metrics are not real-world clinical performance.
BreastDCEDL baselines use MRI-derived tabular features and are not a full clinical pipeline.
Subgroup ECE is computed on simulator-defined subgroup distributions, not real-world demographics.
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Model benchmarks are synthetic or public-data baselines, not clinical validation.

benchmarks.title: Current vs realism-calibrated candidate
benchmarks.claim_boundary: This compares synthetic engineering candidates only. It does not establish clinical validity.

benchmarks.title: Synthetic realism candidate

alignment_score.interpretation: 0.90+ is strong, 0.75+ is passed, 0.60+ is acceptable. This is an engineering realism score, not clinical validity.

limitations: External comparison uses a small MRI-feature dataset and does not validate clinical performance.
Distribution checks are engineering heuristics, not clinical realism certification.
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Synthetic realism checks are engineering proxies only.

benchmarks.title: Noise robustness
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Synthetic perturbations on synthetic data. Real EHR data quality issues may differ in type, frequency, and correlation structure.

benchmarks.title: Temporal generalization
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Synthetic simulator generates ordered patient timelines. Temporal ordering reflects simulator design, not real hospital enrollment patterns.

benchmarks.title: Calibration reliability
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Calibration fitted on synthetic holdout data only. Real-world probability reliability requires external validation.

benchmarks.title: Clinician summary quality
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Clinician-summary benchmark is an engineering proxy. It checks whether the deterministic 10-section template contract is satisfied. It does NOT measure clinical correctness.

benchmarks.title: Optional LLM judge
limitations: LLM-as-judge is a heuristic quality signal, not ground truth.
Scores can vary by judge model and prompt wording.
This evaluates generated answers and source behavior; it is not clinical validation.
benchmarks.claim_boundary: Optional LLM-as-judge heuristic for engineering review only; not clinical truth or safety certification.

benchmarks.title: Public imaging readiness

metrics.recommended_next_task: Run ultrasound baseline: python scripts/run_ultrasound_baseline.py --dataset-root Datasets/BUSI

benchmarks.claim_boundary: Public imaging datasets are used for narrow engineering experiments. They do not make MedicalAgent a diagnostic CT or ultrasound reader.

benchmarks.title: Ultrasound baseline
benchmarks.claim_boundary: This is an engineering baseline on public ultrasound images. It is not a diagnostic or clinical validation model.

benchmarks.title: CT lesion workflow

metrics.reason: DeepLesion or PET/CT lesion dataset not found locally.

benchmarks.claim_boundary: Unavailable artifacts are explicit so the dashboard does not imply hidden validation.

next_actions: Promote the realism-calibrated synthetic candidate after reviewing threshold coverage and model-card language.
Keep LLM-judge optional, or configure a provider and rerun it as a heuristic grounding review.
claim_boundary: Benchmarks are engineering evidence only. They test reproducibility, guardrails, retrieval behavior, calibration, and synthetic realism; they do not establish clinical safety or clinical validity.
